/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto=thin -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o libnlav2.dylib -install_name @rpath/libnlav2.dylib CMakeFiles/nlav2.dir/nlav2.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/sedwards/source/nlav2/build/FreeRDP/client/common -Wl,-rpath,/Users/sedwards/source/nlav2/build/FreeRDP/libfreerdp -Wl,-rpath,/Users/sedwards/source/nlav2/build/FreeRDP/winpr/libwinpr FreeRDP/client/common/libfreerdp-client3.3.27.2.dylib FreeRDP/libfreerdp/libfreerdp3.3.27.2.dylib FreeRDP/winpr/libwinpr/libwinpr3.3.27.2.dylib -lm
